eas_text: A civil authority has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Clark, WA; Clackamas; Columbia; Multnomah; Washington, OR; at 2:16 PM on JUL 26, 2019 Effective until 4:16 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an Emergency Alert System practice demo warning issued by Clark Regional Emergency Services in Vancouver Washington.
